tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
I'm at a party I don't wanna be at[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                       [ch]Bm[/ch]
And I don't ever wear a suit and tie, yeah[/tab]

Wonderin' if I could sneak out the back
[tab]                                 [ch]G[/ch]
Nobody's even lookin' me in my eyes[/tab]

Can you take my hand?
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                    N.C                          [ch]D[/ch]
Finish my drink, say, "Shall we dance?" (Hell, yeah)[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
You know I love ya, did I ever tell ya?[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
You make it better like that[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]Bm[/ch]
Don't think I fit in at this party[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Everyone's got so much to say (Yeah)[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]
I always feel like I'm nobody, mmm[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]*
Who wants to fit in anyway?[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]D[/ch]
'Cause I don't care when I'm with my baby, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Bm[/ch]
All the bad things disappear[/tab]
[tab]                                                   [ch]G[/ch]
And you're making me feel like maybe I am somebody[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]*
I can deal with the bad nights[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]D[/ch]
When I'm with my baby, yeah[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh[/tab]
[tab]N.C                [ch]D[/ch]
'Cause I don't care as long as you just hold me near[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]
You can take me anywhere[/tab]
[tab]                                                     [ch]G[/ch]
And you're making me feel like I'm loved by somebody[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]*
I can deal with the bad nights[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]D[/ch]
When I'm with my baby, yeah[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
We at a party we don't wanna be at[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                     [ch]Bm[/ch]
Tryna talk, but we can't hear ourselves[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Press your lips, I'd rather kiss 'em right back[/tab]

With all these people all around
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I'm crippled with anxiety[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]
But I'm told it's where we're s'posed to be[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]*   [ch]D[/ch]
You know what? It's kinda crazy 'cause I really don't mind[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]
And you make it better like that[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Don't think I fit in at this party[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Everyone's got so much to say (Yeah)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I always feel like I'm nobody, mmm[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                          N.C
Who wants to fit in anyway?[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
'Cause I don't care when I'm with my baby, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Bm[/ch]
All the bad things disappear[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]                                           [ch]G[/ch]
And you're making me feel like maybe I am somebody[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]A[/ch]
I can deal with the bad nights[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]D[/ch]
When I'm with my baby, yeah[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
'Cause I don't care as long as you just hold me near[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]
You can take me anywhere[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bm[/ch]                                     [ch]G[/ch]
And you're making me feel like I'm loved by somebody[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]
I can deal with the bad nights[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]D[/ch]
When I'm with my baby, yeah[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh[/tab]


[Bridge]
N.C
I don't like nobody, but it's like you're the only one here
N.C
I don't like nobody but you, baby, I don't care
N.C
I don't like nobody but you, I hate everyone here
N.C
I don't like nobody but you, baby, yeah

[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]D[/ch]
'Cause I don't care when I'm with my baby, yeah[/tab]
